title: Cobblemon: Mystery Skies
description: A Cobblemon Modpack - Performance Mods, Client QOL and the pack includes a server which has mega evolution, dex rewards, raids and a actual storyline!
body:
Server is currently in "Beta" Phase!
This modpack includes a few QOL mods that will help boost your performance and overall experience while on the server. (Check Included mods) With Intentions to add more Optimizations mods later on.

Currently Based on Cobblemon 1.7.1 if you plan to play on singleplayer with this modpack.

Some Included mods
- Chat Animation - Iris Shaders  - Simple Voice Chat - Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap
For more info or help with installation Join our Discord! : https://discord.gg/YukgTvyDFZ
